title: Require Recipe Stage Authoring File Shape
forbids: standard recipe stage root files that are not the authoring owner shape: createStage must be present, imports must be from stage rails or domain model/artifact surfaces, and operation contract internals must not be mirrored into stage authoring
why: A recipe stage root index.ts is the authoring surface. Public schema, knobs, compile mapping, and step selection belong at that surface; domain modules provide reusable model schemas, model policy, artifact contracts, and public domain surfaces. Stage-local public-config, knobs, and binding helper files are topology residue, not extra authority.
remediate: Inline stage authoring schema/knob/compile surfaces into the owning stage index.ts, move reusable primitives to domain model/schemas or model/policy, and stop mirroring operation input/output/config/strategy members in stage authoring.
message: Stage root index.ts must be the positive authoring owner shape.
